title: Paper Compilation: Recompute Statistics from Raw Data, Write LaTeX, Compile PDF
summary: Demo notebook that loads pre-computed evaluation results (94 examples across 14 datasets: 8 real + 6 synthetic) and recreates the full statistical analysis pipeline from the paper "Spectral Decomposition of Co-Information Feature Graphs for Interpretable Oblique Decision Trees". Recomputes Friedman test (chi2=37.10, p<0.001), Nemenyi post-hoc comparisons, Wilcoxon signed-rank arity test, Hedges' g signed-vs-unsigned ablation, and Spearman frustration correlation. Generates 4 matplotlib figures: pipeline diagram, arity comparison bar chart, frustration scatter plot, and CoI sign distribution. Displays results tables for 8 methods x 8 datasets with best-in-row highlighting, module recovery on synthetic data, and per-method accuracy rankings.
